turnOnDescriptions: Endla leswaku nhlamuselo ya mpfumawulo yi tirha
volumeHelp: Click ku nghena eka volume bar
statusUsingDesc: Hi ku tirhisa vuhundzuluxeri lebyi hlamuseriweke hi mpfumawulo
statusLoadingDesc: Ku layicha vuhundzuluxeri na nhlamuselo ya mpfumawulo
statusUsingNoDesc: Ku tirhisa vuhundzuluxeri lebyi nga riki na nhlamuselo ya mpfumawulo
statusLoadingNoDesc: Ku layicha vuhundzuluxeri handle ka nhlamuselo ya mpfumawulo
alertDescribedVersion: Ku tirhisa vuhundzuluxeri lebyi hlamuseriweke hi mpfumawulo bya vhidiyo
alertNonDescribedVersion: Ku tirhisa vuhundzuluxeri lebyi nga riki na nhlamuselo ya mpfumawulo ya vhidiyo
fallbackError1: Browser ya wena a yi seketeriwi
fallbackError2: Swihlamusela-marito leswi landzelaka swi fambisana na xichayachayani lexi
prefIntroCaptions: Swihlawulekisi leswi landzelaka swi lawula ndlela leyi swihloko leswitsongo swi nyikeriwaka ha yona.
prefIntroDescription1: Xichayachayani lexi xi seketela nhlamuselo ya mpfumawulo hi tindlela timbirhi:
prefIntroDescriptionNone: Vhidiyo ya sweswi a yi na nhlamuselo ya mpfumawulo hi xivumbeko xihi na xihi.
prefIntroDescription3: Tirhisa fomo leyi nga laha hansi ku veka leswi u swi tsakelaka eka nhlamuselo ya mpfumawulo eka tsalwa.
prefIntroDescription4: Endzhaku ko hlayisa swiyimiso, u nga ha pfula kumbe ku tima nhlamuselo ya mpfumawulo hi buti leyi fanaka.
prefIntroKeyboard1: Xichayachayani lexi nga eka tluka leri xi nga tirhisiwa ku suka kun’wana na kun’wana hi ku tirhisa tindlela to koma ta khibhodi (vona nxaxamelo laha hansi).
prefIntroKeyboard2: U nga hlamusela swilotlelo swa mucinci (Alt, Control na/kumbe Shift).
prefIntroKeyboard3: XIYA: Ku hlanganisiwa kun’wana ka swilotlelo ku nga ha lwisana ni leswi tirhisiwaka hi browser ya wena na/kumbe switirhisiwa swin’wana. Ringeta ku hlanganisiwa ko hambana na swilotlelo swa modifier ku kondza u kuma leswi ku fanelaka.
prefIntroTranscript: Swihlawulekisi leswi landzelaka swi khumba matsalelo ya vuhlanganisi.
prefCookieWarning: Ku hlayisa swihlawulekisi swa wena ku tirhisiwa ka tikhukhi swa laveka.
prefHeadingKeyboard1: Tikhiyi ta mucinci leti tirhisiwaka tanihi switshunxo swa khibhodi
prefHeadingTranscript: Ku tsariwa ka matsalelo hi ku tirhisana
escapeKeyFunction: Pfala dialog ya sweswi kumbe popup
prefDescFormatHelp: Loko tifomati leti hatimbirhi ti ri kona, ku ta tirhisiwa yin’we ntsena ya tona.
prefDescFormatOption1: Vhidiyo yin’wana leyi nga ni nhlamuselo ya mpfumawulo leyi nghenisiweke (leyi rhekhodiweke ka ha ri emahlweni).
prefDescFormatOption1b: vuhundzuluxeri byin’wana lebyi nga ni nhlamuselo ya mpfumawulo
prefDescFormatOption2: Nhlamuselo ya tsalwa leyi hlayiwaka hi xihlaya xa xikirini (TTS) .
prefDescPause: Yimisa vhidiyo hi ku tisungulela loko nhlamuselo yi sungula
prefDescVisible: Kombisa nhlamuselo eka tsalwa loko yi pfuriwile
sampleDescriptionText: Lulamisa swiyimiso swa wena leswaku u twa tsalwa leri ra xikombiso.
prefHighlight: Kandziyisa tsalwa leri tsariweke loko leswi nga endzeni swi ya emahlweni
prefTabbable: Ku Tsariwa loku Tirhisiwaka hi Khibhodi
captionsStylePopOn: Pop-on yi tlhela yi va kona
prefNoChange: Ku hava ku cinca loku endliweke.
windowMoveLeft: Fasitere ri rhurhele etlhelo ra ximatsi
windowMoveRight: Fasitere ri rhurhele etlhelo ra xinene
windowMoveStopped: Ku famba-famba ka fasitere ku yimile
signControls: Swilawuri swa Fasitere ra Ririmi ra Mavoko
windowMoveAlert: Koka kutani u tirhisa swilotlelo swa miseve ku fambisa fasitere; Cinekela Enter ku yima.
height: Ehenhla ka xiyimo xa le henhla
windowSendBackAlert: Fasitere leri a ri le ndzhaku ka nchumu wihi na wihi.
windowBringTopAlert: Fasitere leri sweswi ri le mahlweni ka swilo leswin’wana hinkwaswo eka tluka.
resultsSummary4: Click nkarhi lowu fambisanaka ni nchumu wihi na wihi leswaku u tlanga vhidiyo ku sukela enkarhini wolowo.
enableKeyboardShortcuts: Endla leswaku switshunxo swa khibhodi swi tirha
aboutTitle: Malunghana na Mutlangi loyi a nga ni vuswikoti
productNameWeb: Mutlangi wa vuswikoti TOTHOM Nkandziyiso wa Webu
productNameWp: Mutlangi wa vuswikoti TOTHOM wa WordPress
copyrightSuffix: TOTHOMweb ya xirhendzevutani. Timfanelo hinkwato ti hlayisiwile.
webEditionDescription: Nkandziyiso lowu endleriweke wena ni lowu andlariweke wa xichayachayani xa swihangalasamahungu lexi fikelelaka Able Player. Ku cinciwa na mintirho yo engetela leyi tumbuluxiweke hi TOTHOMweb i software ya vulawuri.
wpEditionDescription: Plugin ya WordPress leyi engetelaka xitirhisiwa eka Elementor, leyi endleriweke ku hlanganisa nkandziyiso lowu endleriweke no ndlandlamuxiwa wa xichayachayani xa swihangalasamahungu lexi fikelelaka Able Player. Ku cinciwa na mintirho yo engetela leyi tumbuluxiweke hi TOTHOMweb i software ya vulawuri.
thirdPartyDescription: Xiendliwa lexi xi katsa software leyi landzelaka ya xihlovo lexi pfulekeke:
ablePlayerCopyright: © 2014-2025 Vahoxa xandla va Mutlangi lava nga na vuswikoti
distributedUnder: Ku hangalasiwa ehansi ka swipimelo swa
